creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: olivierd
Date: Mon Jul 22 16:41:20 2013
New Revision: 323477
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323477

Log:
  - Update to 0.5
  - Replace tab by space in WWW entry (pkg-descr)
  
  PR:		179622
  Submitted by:	myself
  Approved by:	Oleg Pudeyev (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/py-flask-flatpages/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-flask-flatpages/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/py-flask-flatpages/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-flask-flatpages/Makefile	Mon Jul 22 16:29:59 2013	(r323476)
+++ head/www/py-flask-flatpages/Makefile	Mon Jul 22 16:41:20 2013	(r323477)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Flask-FlatPages
-PORTVERSION=	0.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.5
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

Modified: head/www/py-flask-flatpages/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-flask-flatpages/distinfo	Mon Jul 22 16:29:59 2013	(r323476)
+++ head/www/py-flask-flatpages/distinfo	Mon Jul 22 16:41:20 2013	(r323477)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Flask-FlatPages-0.3.tar.gz) = a0647929c87db08184f0db1db142d7d8f3c9fcadb4ecd8eebaace478eda838e6
-SIZE (Flask-FlatPages-0.3.tar.gz) = 18431
+SHA256 (Flask-FlatPages-0.5.tar.gz) = 6c6c78bf4b0a6396606b8af63af23ea91ac93ee935108c885b4cfdc420eb999b
+SIZE (Flask-FlatPages-0.5.tar.gz) = 20949

Modified: head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-descr	Mon Jul 22 16:29:59 2013	(r323476)
+++ head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-descr	Mon Jul 22 16:41:20 2013	(r323477)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Provides flat static pages to a Flask application, based on text files
 as opposed to a relational database.
 
-WWW:    https://github.com/SimonSapin/Flask-FlatPages
+WWW: https://github.com/SimonSapin/Flask-FlatPages

Modified: head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-plist	Mon Jul 22 16:29:59 2013	(r323476)
+++ head/www/py-flask-flatpages/pkg-plist	Mon Jul 22 16:41:20 2013	(r323477)
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages/foo/42/not_a_page.txt
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages/foo/bar.html
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages/foo/lorem/ipsum.html
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages/headerid.html
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages/hello.html
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages/not_a_page.txt
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_flatpages/pages_shift_jis/hello.html
